name: knowledge_base_generation_and_self_healing
purpose: Generate and update the AI knowledge base under /ai so the helper can persist new business features, flows, and indexes instead of relying only on runtime discovery.

related_ext_files.role: Validates discovery results and writes new feature and flow JSON files without overwriting existing knowledge.
Provides safe JSON load and write helpers used to update the AI indexes.
Defines the project kickoff workflow that leads from discovery to KB generation.
Captures the delivery order and constraints for building a reusable project knowledge base.

notes: Write-back is intentionally gated by confidence and existence checks to avoid low-quality KB mutations.
This feature turns one-off discovery into durable project knowledge.
